next_steps: Obtain TSH, free T4, and total T3 levels
Perform diagnostic thyroid ultrasound to assess for abscess formation versus thyroiditis patterns
Perform fine-needle aspiration (FNA) of any suspicious thyroid nodule for cytology and culture
Order serology for Coccidioides immitis and Bartonella henselae
Review medication list for potential causes of drug-induced fever and consider a trial of medication discontinuation
Repeat blood cultures (aerobic, anaerobic, and fungal) to rule out indolent infection
